dir:
&OnSelectionOutline; onchange="onChange$WorkingHistory$ChangeCategory(this);"
onchange="onChange$WorkingHistory$Position(this);"
select 'set$ViewPanelEmployeeID(this);active$FormWorkingHistory(this);' as message return
select 'set$ViewPanelEmployeeID(this);scatter$FormWorkingHistory(this);' as message return
select 'close$FormWorkingHistory(this);' as message return
declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$dateConflict nvarchar(512), @$insertConflict nvarchar(512), @$duplicateConflict nvarchar(512), @$updateConflict nvarchar(512), @$deleteConflict nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Ngày bắt đầu đã có hoặc không hợp lệ.' else N'The start date is invalid or already exists.' end select @$dateConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Ngày bắt đầu không được lớn hơn ngày nghỉ.' else N'Start date must be before leaving date.' end select @$insertConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Chưa nhập tính chất là công việc chính và loại thay đổi là tăng mới.' else N'Position nature must be official and change category must be new employment.' end select @$duplicateConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Đã tồn tại tính chất là công việc chính và loại thay đổi là tăng mới.' else N'Position with nature as official and change category as new employment already exists.' end select @$updateConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Tính chất phải là công việc chính và loại thay đổi phải là tăng mới.' else N'Position nature must be official and change category must be new employment.' end select @$deleteConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Thông tin quá trình làm việc tại công ty đã phát sinh, không thể xóa được tính chất công việc chính và loại thay đổi tăng mới.' else N'Cannot delete current work information. It has already been used.' end
if ((@tinh_chat <> '1') or (@loai_thay_doi <> '1')) and not exists(select 1 from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec) begin select 'loai_thay_doi' as field, @$insertConflict as message return end
if (@tinh_chat = '1' and @loai_thay_doi = '1') and exists(select 1 from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec and tinh_chat = '1' and loai_thay_doi = '1') begin select 'loai_thay_doi' as field, @$duplicateConflict as message return end
if (@tinh_chat = '1') and exists(select * from @@table where (stt_rec = @stt_rec and tinh_chat = @tinh_chat and ngay_tu = @ngay_tu)) begin select 'ngay_tu' as field, @$exists as message return end
if exists(select 1 from hrnv where stt_rec = @stt_rec and @ngay_tu > ngay_nghi) begin select 'ngay_tu' as field, @$dateConflict as message return end
if (@loai = '1' and @tinh_chat = '1') and exists(select 1 from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec and loai = '1' and tinh_chat = '1') update @@table set loai = '2' where stt_rec = @stt_rec and loai = '1' and tinh_chat = '1'
if exists(select 1 from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec) select @stt_rec0 = max(stt_rec0), @line_nbr = max(line_nbr) from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec else select @stt_rec0 = '000', @line_nbr = 0
exec dbo.FastBusiness$HRM$GetRowID @stt_rec0 output, @line_nbr output select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID
if (@loai = '1' and @tinh_chat = '1') begin declare @unit varchar(32), @reference varchar(512) select @unit = ma_dvcs, @reference = bp_ref from hrbp where ma_bp = @bo_phan update hrnv set bo_phan = @bo_phan, ma_dvcs = @unit, bp_ref = @reference, vi_tri = @vi_tri, bac_quan_ly = @bac_quan_ly, nv_ql = @nguoi_quan_ly where stt_rec = @stt_rec end if @@language = 'v' begin select @stt_rec0 as stt_rec0, case @loai when '1' then N'Công việc hiện tại' else N'Công việc trước đây' end as ten_loai, case @tinh_chat when '1' then N'Công việc chính' else N'Công việc kiêm nhiệm' end as ten_tc end else begin select @stt_rec0 as stt_rec0, case @loai when '1' then N'Current Position' else N'Previous Position' end as ten_loai2, case @tinh_chat when '1' then N'Official Position' else N'Concurrent Position' end as ten_tc2 end update hrnv set bp_chinh_thuc0 = bo_phan, vt_chinh_thuc0 = vi_tri, ql_chinh_thuc0 = bac_quan_ly where stt_rec = @stt_rec update hrnv set bp_chinh_thuc0 = b.bo_phan, vt_chinh_thuc0 = b.vi_tri, ql_chinh_thuc0 = b.bac_quan_ly from hrnv a join (select a.stt_rec, a.bo_phan, a.vi_tri, a.bac_quan_ly from @@table a join (select a.stt_rec, max(a.ngay_tu) as ngay_tu from @@table a join hrnv b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec where a.stt_rec = @stt_rec and a.tinh_chat = '1' and a.ngay_tu <= b.ngay_chinh_thuc group by a.stt_rec) b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec and a.ngay_tu = b.ngay_tu) b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec where a.stt_rec = @stt_rec
if ((@tinh_chat <> '1') or (@loai_thay_doi <> '1')) and exists(select 1 from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec and (tinh_chat = '1') and (loai_thay_doi = '1') and (stt_rec0 = @stt_rec0)) begin select 'loai_thay_doi' as field, @$updateConflict as message return end
if (@tinh_chat = '1' and @loai_thay_doi = '1') and exists(select 1 from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec0 <> @stt_rec0 and tinh_chat = '1' and loai_thay_doi = '1') begin select 'loai_thay_doi' as field, @$duplicateConflict as message return end
if (@tinh_chat = '1') and exists(select 1 from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec and (tinh_chat = @tinh_chat) and (ngay_tu = @ngay_tu) and (stt_rec0 <> @stt_rec0)) begin select 'ngay_tu' as field, @$exists as message return end
if exists(select 1 from hrnv where stt_rec = @stt_rec and @ngay_tu > ngay_nghi) begin select 'ngay_tu' as field, @$dateConflict as message return end
if (@loai = '1' and @tinh_chat = '1') and exists(select 1 from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec and loai = '1' and tinh_chat = '1' and stt_rec0 <> @stt_rec0) begin update @@table set loai = '2' where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec0 <> @stt_rec0 update hrnv set vi_tri = '', bac_quan_ly = '', nv_ql = '' where stt_rec = @stt_rec end
if (@loai = '1' and @tinh_chat = '1') begin declare @unit varchar(32), @reference varchar(512) select @unit = ma_dvcs, @reference = bp_ref from hrbp where ma_bp = @bo_phan update hrnv set bo_phan = @bo_phan, ma_dvcs = @unit, bp_ref = @reference, vi_tri = @vi_tri, bac_quan_ly = @bac_quan_ly, nv_ql = @nguoi_quan_ly where stt_rec = @stt_rec end update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec0 = @stt_rec0 if @@language = 'v' begin select case @loai when '1' then N'Công việc hiện tại' else N'Công việc trước đây' end as ten_loai, case @tinh_chat when '1' then N'Công việc chính' else N'Công việc kiêm nhiệm' end as ten_tc end else begin select case @loai when '1' then N'Current Position' else N'Previous Position' end as ten_loai2, case @tinh_chat when '1' then N'Official Position' else N'Concurrent Position' end as ten_tc2 end update hrnv set bp_chinh_thuc0 = bo_phan, vt_chinh_thuc0 = vi_tri, ql_chinh_thuc0 = bac_quan_ly where stt_rec = @stt_rec update hrnv set bp_chinh_thuc0 = b.bo_phan, vt_chinh_thuc0 = b.vi_tri, ql_chinh_thuc0 = b.bac_quan_ly from hrnv a join (select a.stt_rec, a.bo_phan, a.vi_tri, a.bac_quan_ly from @@table a join (select a.stt_rec, max(a.ngay_tu) as ngay_tu from @@table a join hrnv b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec where a.stt_rec = @stt_rec and a.tinh_chat = '1' and a.ngay_tu <= b.ngay_chinh_thuc group by a.stt_rec) b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec and a.ngay_tu = b.ngay_tu) b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec where a.stt_rec = @stt_rec
if exists(select 1 from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec having count(*) > 1) begin if exists(select 1 from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec0 = @stt_rec0 and loai_thay_doi = '1' and tinh_chat = '1') begin select @$deleteConflict as message return end end
if exists(select 1 from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec0 = @stt_rec0 and loai = '1' and tinh_chat = '1') update hrnv set vi_tri = '', bac_quan_ly = '', nv_ql = '' where stt_rec = @stt_rec
update hrnv set bp_chinh_thuc0 = bo_phan, vt_chinh_thuc0 = vi_tri, ql_chinh_thuc0 = bac_quan_ly where stt_rec = @stt_rec update hrnv set bp_chinh_thuc0 = b.bo_phan, vt_chinh_thuc0 = b.vi_tri, ql_chinh_thuc0 = b.bac_quan_ly from hrnv a join (select a.stt_rec, a.bo_phan, a.vi_tri, a.bac_quan_ly from @@table a join (select a.stt_rec, max(a.ngay_tu) as ngay_tu from @@table a join hrnv b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec where a.stt_rec = @stt_rec and a.tinh_chat = '1' and a.ngay_tu <= b.ngay_chinh_thuc group by a.stt_rec) b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec and a.ngay_tu = b.ngay_tu) b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec where a.stt_rec = @stt_rec
&OutlineEntry;
function active$FormWorkingHistory(f) { var id = f.getItemValue('stt_rec'); f.add_onResponseComplete(on$FormWorkingHistory$ResponseComplete); if (f._action == 'New') f.request('DefautFormValue', 'DefautFormValue', [['stt_rec', 'String', id]]); } function scatter$FormWorkingHistory(f) { var id = f.getItemValue('stt_rec'); if (f._action == 'New') f.request('DefautFormValue', 'DefautFormValue', [['stt_rec', 'String', id]]); } function close$FormWorkingHistory(f) {try {f.remove_onResponseComplete(on$FormWorkingHistory$ResponseComplete)} catch (ex) {}} function onChange$WorkingHistory$Position(o) {o.parentForm.request('Position', 'Position', ['vi_tri'], o);} function onChange$WorkingHistory$ChangeCategory(o) { var f = o.parentForm, t = f.getItemValue('loai_thay_doi'); if ((t == '4') || (t == '5')) {f.request('Category', 'Category', ['stt_rec', 'loai', 'tinh_chat'], o);} } function on$FormWorkingHistory$ResponseComplete(sender, e) { var f = e.object, context = e.type.Context, result = e.type.Result; switch (context) { case 'DefautFormValue': if (!result[0].Value) { f.setItemValue('loai_thay_doi', 2); break; } f.setItemControlBehavior('bo_phan', result[1].Value, result[2].Value, true); f.setItemControlBehavior('vi_tri', result[3].Value, result[4].Value, true); f.setItemControlBehavior('bac_quan_ly', result[5].Value, result[6].Value, true); f.setItemControlBehavior('nguoi_quan_ly', result[7].Value, result[8].Value, true); f.setItemValue('ngay_tu', result[9].Value); break; case 'Position': f.setItemControlBehavior('bac_quan_ly', result[0].Value, result[1].Value, true); f.live(f.getItem('bac_quan_ly')); break; case 'Category': f.setItemControlBehavior('bo_phan', result[0].Value, result[1].Value, true); f.setItemControlBehavior('vi_tri', result[2].Value, result[3].Value, true); f.setItemControlBehavior('bac_quan_ly', result[4].Value, result[5].Value, true); f.setItemControlBehavior('nguoi_quan_ly', result[6].Value, result[7].Value, true); break; default: break; } }
if exists(select 1 from hrvt where ma_vtr = @vi_tri and ma_bac <> '') begin declare @level varchar(32) select @level = ma_bac from hrvt where ma_vtr = @vi_tri select rtrim(@level) as ma_bac, ten_bac%l from hrdmbql where ma_bac = @level return end
declare @b bit if not exists(select 1 from hreqtlvht where stt_rec = @stt_rec) select @b = 1 else select @b = 0 if (@b = 1) begin select @b, rtrim(a.bo_phan) as bo_phan, case @@language when 'v' then b.ten_bp else b.ten_bp2 end, rtrim(a.vi_tri) as vi_tri, case @@language when 'v' then c.ten_vtr else c.ten_vtr2 end, a.bac_quan_ly, case @@language when 'v' then d.ten_bac else d.ten_bac2 end, rtrim(nv_ql) as nv_ql, ten, ngay_vao from hrnv a left join hrbp b on a.bo_phan = b.ma_bp left join hrvt c on a.vi_tri = c.ma_vtr left join hrdmbql d on a.bac_quan_ly = d.ma_bac left join vhrnv e on a.nv_ql = e.ma_nv where a.stt_rec = @stt_rec return end else begin select @b as value return end
if exists(select 1 from hreqtlvht where stt_rec = @stt_rec and loai = @loai and tinh_chat = @tinh_chat) begin select top 1 rtrim(a.bo_phan), case @@language when 'V' then b.ten_bp else b.ten_bp2 end, rtrim(a.vi_tri), case @@language when 'V' then c.ten_vtr else c.ten_vtr2 end, a.bac_quan_ly, case @@language when 'V' then d.ten_bac else d.ten_bac2 end, a.nguoi_quan_ly, e.ten from hreqtlvht a left join hrbp b on a.bo_phan = b.ma_bp left join hrvt c on a.vi_tri = c.ma_vtr left join hrdmbql d on a.bac_quan_ly = d.ma_bac left join vhrnv e on a.nguoi_quan_ly = e.ma_nv where a.stt_rec = @stt_rec and a.loai = @loai and a.tinh_chat = '1' order by a.ngay_tu desc return end
&OutlineCss;
